items.briefing:
Fortinet firewall users should be aware of an ongoing attack campaign dubbed "FortiBleed," where attackers are exploiting vulnerabilities to turn firewalls into tools that steal login credentials — a serious risk for any organisation using these devices. Separately, Google has taken legal action against a Chinese network sending fake phishing text messages, a reminder that scam texts remain a significant threat to Australian individuals and businesses.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Fortinet firewalls, check with your IT team today to confirm firmware is fully up to date and review any recent login alerts for unusual activity.

featured.title: FortiBleed Attackers Turn Firewalls Into Credential Stealers as Heists Persist
featured.quote: Hackers weaponized firewall vulnerabilities to steal credentials from 430,000 Australian businesses.
